name: ROBUSDF
description: Student User DeFined table. Info courtesy of Vicki

columns.name: ROBUSDF_AIDY_CODE
columns.description: Aid Year code.

columns.name: ROBUSDF_PIDM
columns.description: Internal ID. Use to join

columns.name: ROBUSDF_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.description: Date this row was last changed/accessed

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_1
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 1-5 are the data from the OKPROM file loads done via sync". This field is likely E, N, X, Y, y, or NULL

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_2
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 1-5 are the data from the OKPROM file loads done via sync". This field is usually Y or NULL but can be E, F, N, 6, GRAD, X, or e.

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_3
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 1-5 are the data from the OKPROM file loads done via sync". The type here is VARCHAR technically but this is a date column.

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_4
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 1-5 are the data from the OKPROM file loads done via sync". This column stores numerical values

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_5
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 1-5 are the data from the OKPROM file loads done via sync". This column stores numerical values

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_6
columns.description: Values stored here seem to be E, Y, N, or NULL. Most likely an indicator for scripts

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_7
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 7-11 are the data pertaining to the OTAG awards & claims. This value has only dates stored in it up to this point.

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_8
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 7-11 are the data pertaining to the OTAG awards & claims

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_9
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 7-11 are the data pertaining to the OTAG awards & claims. This column is almost always F or NULL here.

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_10
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 7-11 are the data pertaining to the OTAG awards & claims. Common values are E, F, Y, N, and NULL

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_11
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 7-11 are the data pertaining to the OTAG awards & claims. This column is used to store a date

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_12
columns.description: From Vicki: Field 12 is updated when fields 1-5 are updated so we will know we have current info

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_13
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 13-14 are used to check eligibility for OKPROM". This column stores a year most of the time (Ex: 2010)

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_14
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 13-14 are used to check eligibility for OKPROM". This column almost always stores Y/y, N, X/x, or NULL

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_15
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 15-18 are used in budgeting to keep track of the OPT students year". Commonly stored here is Y, x, X, NULL

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_16
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 15-18 are used in budgeting to keep track of the OPT students year". Commonly stored here is Y, x, X, NULL

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_17
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 15-18 are used in budgeting to keep track of the OPT students year". Commonly stored here is Y, x, X, NULL

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_18
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 15-18 are used in budgeting to keep track of the OPT students year". Commonly stored here is Y, X, x NULL

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_19
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 19 and 20 are fields updated by scripts, Written by Brooks and used in Tracking and Budgeting". Tracking and Budgeting are both sub-Process Flows of the Automic Process Flow "FA_DAILY". Numerical values are stored here

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_20
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 19 and 20 are fields updated by scripts, Written by Brooks and used in Tracking and Budgeting". Tracking and Budgeting are both sub-Process Flows of the Automic Process Flow "FA_DAILY". Numerical values 1,2,3, or NULL are stored here

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_21
columns.description: From Vicki: "Field 21 and fields 31-39 are used in budgeting for different rate types". Looks like there have been Y, X values stored here but also term codes at times.

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_22
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 22-25 are used to track Inspire to Teach students". Values here are Y, 2.0, 2.75, 2.5, so possibly GPA data.

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_23
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 22-25 are used to track Inspire to Teach students". Values: E, Y, NULL

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_24
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 22-25 are used to track Inspire to Teach students". Values: e, Y

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_25
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 22-25 are used to track Inspire to Teach students". Values: Y, NULL

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_26
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 26-28 are updated by the P_ROAUSDF_DAYS_ENROLLED procedure and used in budgeting". Like mentioned above Budgeting is an Automic Process Flow inside FA_DAILY. Numerics stored here

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_27
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 26-28 are updated by the P_ROAUSDF_DAYS_ENROLLED procedure and used in budgeting". Like mentioned above Budgeting is an Automic Process Flow inside FA_DAILY. Numerics stored here

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_28
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 26-28 are updated by the P_ROAUSDF_DAYS_ENROLLED procedure and used in budgeting". Like mentioned above Budgeting is an Automic Process Flow inside FA_DAILY. Numerics stored here

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_29
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 29-30 are internally used by counselors". Values here vary wildly, all strings. Some examples are DOCS, W, NC, GR, SAP, NOELG.

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_30
columns.description: From Vicki: "Fields 29-30 are internally used by counselors". Values here vary wildly, all strings. Some examples are PJO, susp, P, A, 2.

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_31
columns.description: From Vicki: "Field 21 and fields 31-39 are used in budgeting for different rate types"

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_32
columns.description: From Vicki: "Field 21 and fields 31-39 are used in budgeting for different rate types"

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_33
columns.description: From Vicki: "Field 21 and fields 31-39 are used in budgeting for different rate types"

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_34
columns.description: From Vicki: "Field 21 and fields 31-39 are used in budgeting for different rate types"

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_35
columns.description: From Vicki: "Field 21 and fields 31-39 are used in budgeting for different rate types"

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_36
columns.description: From Vicki: "Field 21 and fields 31-39 are used in budgeting for different rate types"

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_37
columns.description: From Vicki: "Field 21 and fields 31-39 are used in budgeting for different rate types"

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_38
columns.description: From Vicki: "Field 21 and fields 31-39 are used in budgeting for different rate types"

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_39
columns.description: From Vicki: "Field 21 and fields 31-39 are used in budgeting for different rate types"

columns.name: ROBUSDF_VALUE_40
columns.description: From Vicki: "Field 40 is used to signify that the student has a consortium agreement". Only values I see here are y and NULL.
